---
title: "Team"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

The DAWA project brings together researchers and public health experts
from Switzerland and Tanzania. Team member profiles will be added here.

---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.team-card}
**[Name]**
*[Title]*
Centre for Primary Care and Public Health (Unisanté), University of
Lausanne, Switzerland
:::

---

## Co-Investigators and Collaborators

::: {.team-card}
**[Dr Andrew Katende]**
*[Title]*
Ifakara Health Institute (IHI), Tanzania
Unisanté, Lausanne, Switzerland
University of Lausanne, Switzerland
:::

::: {.team-card}
**[Dr Nina Emery]**
*[Title]*
Unisanté, Lausanne, Switzerland
Ifakara Health Institute (IHI), Tanzania
University of Lausanne, Switzerland
:::

::: {.team-card}
**[Name]**
*[Title]*
Zanzibar Ministry of Health, Tanzania
:::

---

## Institutions

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Centre for Primary Care and Public Health (Unisanté)**
University of Lausanne
44 Bugnon Road, 1011 Lausanne
Switzerland
*Sponsor and coordinating centre*
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Ifakara Health Institute (IHI)**
PO Box 78373
Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
*Implementation partner*
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
**Zanzibar Ministry of Health**
Zanzibar, Tanzania
*Government partner*
:::

::::

<style>
.team-card {
  border: 1px solid #d0e8d8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background-color: #f6fbf8;
}
</style>
